name: natios-shoptet-theme
description: Build-and-deploy pipeline for a Shoptet e-commerce theme. Auto-discovers SCSS partials and JS modules, bundles into one minified autoprefixed CSS and one minified JS, deploys via FTP with an API-driven cache-bust.

scripts.build:css: npm run css:compile && npm run css:process
scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.dev: npm run generate && npm-run-all --parallel watch:entries dev:css:compile dev:css:process dev:js
